title: The Dragon's Quest
description: Help the dragons find their lost treasures scattered across the city! Collect all the magical spots to complete the hunt.
imageAlt: Dragons flying over a magical city

1.name: The Dragon's Garden
1.hint: Look for the red door with a golden knocker.
1.imageAlt: Lush green garden with stone statues

2.name: The Crystal Tower
2.hint: Follow the blue mosaic path east.
2.imageAlt: Tall tower with sparkling crystal panels

3.name: The Whispering Well
3.hint: Listen carefully by the stone well.
3.collectedText: The well echoes with ancient magic! 🌊
3.imageAlt: Old stone well with glowing water
